description: Token budget management: read only what you need now. Three operational rules — replaces CBUDGET-V1, STI-V2, CB-V1.

lazy_loading.principle: Process files (process-*.json) are schema_refs — read specific step when needed, not the whole file upfront.

examples.then: read process-ingest.json#step_8a_new_page, not the entire 600-line file
read process-query.json#step_1.5, not the entire 666-line file

source_lifecycle.principle: One source at a time: read → extract → write wiki → close. Before reading next, ensure previous is closed.
source_lifecycle.prohibited: Holding ≥2 source texts simultaneously during batch ingest
source_lifecycle.rationale: Raw source text is re-fetchable from disk once wiki page exists. Keeping it wastes context on data already captured.

context_bubble.rule: When opening N+1th wiki page for reading → close one of the current N first.
context_bubble.rationale: Ensures space for new reading without accumulating stale page content.
